name: NotebookLM Research
description_en: An autonomous research agent powered by Google NotebookLM: ingest sources (URL, text, PDF, DOCX, YouTube, Drive), run deep web research, ask cited questions, and generate artifacts (report, slides, quiz, flashcards, mind map, audio/video) plus Claude-written content drafts.
description_zh: 由 Google NotebookLM 驱动的自主研究 agent:摄取来源(URL、文本、PDF、DOCX、YouTube、Drive),执行深度网络研究、提出带引证的问题,并生成多种产物(报告、幻灯片、测验、闪卡、思维导图、音/视频)以及由 Claude 撰写的内容草稿。
long_en: Drives a source-grounded research-and-synthesis pipeline end to end, turning a topic or a pile of sources into cited answers and finished artifacts.
long_zh: 端到端驱动一条以来源为依据的研究与综合流水线,把一个主题或一堆来源变成带引证的答案与成品产物。
sec_note_en: Drives Google NotebookLM through the unofficial notebooklm-py library, so it may break on Google changes and is subject to NotebookLM's Terms; optional social publishing is opt-in.
sec_note_zh: 通过非官方的 notebooklm-py 库驱动 Google NotebookLM,Google 改动时可能失效,并受 NotebookLM 服务条款约束;可选的社媒发布为按需开启。
